case_title: PLASTIK, RICHARD VS NISONGER, DAVID JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLASTIK, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NISONGER, DAVID JR. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR PLASTIK, RICHARD ASSIGNED TO HAWKINS & VAN DYCK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PLASTIK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT NISONGER, DAVID JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NISONGER, DAVID JR.
